---
name: ux-ui-review
description: Review user-facing app/docs/notebook UX for clarity, accessibility, and flow quality.
user-invocable: true
---

# Skill: ux-ui-review

## Purpose

Provide consistent UX review across app, docs, and notebooks.

## Inputs

- UI-facing code/docs/notebook changes.
- User journey and task flow context.

## Checks

1. State coverage: loading/success/empty/error.
2. Action feedback and error affordances.
3. Accessibility basics and copy clarity.
4. Tutorial/notebook flow reproducibility.

## Output

- UX issues by severity.
- Required fixes.
- Optional polish notes.
